instructions: Enforce project standards: Python 3.13+ with mypy strict and ruff, 100-character lines, absolute imports only, English-only and ASCII-only code, comments, and docstrings. Public Python functions and methods need reStructuredText docstrings with :param:, :return:, and :raises:. Flag leftover commented-out code, _old or _deprecated suffixes, and TODO-remove-later notes.

rules.rule: Keep endpoints thin; business logic belongs in service classes injected via FastAPI dependencies. Validate input and output with Pydantic schemas and raise custom exceptions rather than a bare HTTPException.
Follow OOP and SOLID: immutable value objects use @dataclass(frozen=True), prefer composition over inheritance, and depend on abstractions (ABC or Protocol) injected through the constructor.
User-facing text must be added to both the en and cs locales under frontend/src/i18n/locales; do not hardcode display strings in components.
